rationale: Line-by-line comparison against frozen v12 Task 1 and the Slice 1 acceptance criteria shows a faithful implementation with no reinterpretation or scope expansion. (1) package.json: sets name, private:true, type:module, engines.node>=18; both dependency fields are omitted (verified by the gate's zero-deps check exit=0). The added version/description/scripts fields are necessary or benign: scripts.test implements the required 'npm test runs check then test-all' sequencing (&& gives fail-closed ordering), and version/description do not alter behavior or scope. (2) check.mjs: recursively enumerates *.mjs below clotho/ (ROOT resolves to the package root from scripts/), normalizes to forward-slash relative paths and sorts — a correct realization of 'POSIX path order' — then invokes process.execPath --check per file via execFileSync with an args array and no shell option; execFileSync throws on non-zero exit, so it fails closed. Gate confirms exit=0 over 3 files (the three scripts, matching expectations). (3) test-all.mjs: contains the committed ordered TESTS list, spawns each test in a fresh Node process via execFileSync(process.execPath, ...), and fails with exit 1 if any unlisted test-*.mjs exists anywhere under clotho/. The SELF exclusion is a necessary and narrowly scoped disambiguation: test-all.mjs lexically matches test-*.mjs but is the runner, not a test; excluding only the runner's own resolved path does not weaken the fail-closed guarantee for any other file. (4) test-registry.mjs prints exactly 'clotho scaffold OK' and its comments explicitly restate the anti-overstatement boundary from the governance record rather than claiming functionality. (5) Diff confinement: only clotho/ files plus the single .gitignore line adding .telos/clotho/; the gate's git diff --quiet against .github/ confirms workflows are untouched, honoring the Task 0 separation. (6) Repo conventions: ESM throughout, node:-prefixed stdlib imports only, zero runtime dependencies, no bundler/transpiler. The deterministic gate is 10/10 (finalStatus meets, converged, no surviving blockers), and its checks correspond to the acceptance criteria (file existence, ESM/engines markers, check and test-all green, zero-deps, workflows-untouched). Minor observations, none blocking: check.mjs would recurse into node_modules or .telos if they ever existed inside clotho/ — irrelevant for a zero-dependency package with .telos/clotho/ gitignored at repo root, and 'every .mjs below clotho/' is the literal Task 1 wording anyway; the unlisted-test error goes to stderr with a clear remediation message. Nothing exceeds Task 1; nothing from Tasks 0 or 2–7 is anticipated or smuggled in. I would sign this as-is.
